title: UHC crafts pack
description: Adds crafting recipes to make uhc / battle royale more epic and easy
body:
This datapack adds crafts for items, whick have impossible crafts, which can help to win for Battle Royale, UHC and etc:

Enchanted golden apple,
Golden apple (+ removed original craft),
Totem of undying,
Cobwebs,
Trident,
Obsidian (water + lava buckets),
Bottle o' enchanting,
Saddle (like in newer versions),
Horse armor,
Faster smelting (raw blocks)

I also added [Hoplite recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hoplite-recipes) + [Hoplite weapons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vreds-hoplite-weapons-datapack) datapacks compat (info
in changelog)

In future, I want to add function to give recipes, or you can just give all to everyone

Thanks to [gisky](https://modrinth.com/user/gisky) for pack icon
